Note:
Timer before Game Over [16-Bit]

0x03b2 = Initial Value on continue screen
Decreases every frames if Mickey does not move
0x0000 = Game Reset

Game State [16-Bit]

0x02 = SEGA Screen
0x06 = Intro Cutscene/Title Screen
0x0a = Settings
0x0e = Gameplay
0x12 = Title Screen
0x16 = End game cutscene, credits
0x1a = Continue Screen
0x1e = Walt Disney screen before autodemo
0x22 = Mickey walking in the castle
0x26 = Level Completed Score Screen
0x2a = Old Mouse cutscene
0X2e = Minnie Rescued

// Original note by Scott

Ammo Count literal,
Maxes out at 0x1e or 30

Mickey Number of Tries remaining [8-bit] 
Maxes out at 0x0a or 10 
Zero means game over.

Set to 01 when demo mode is active
Resets to title if start is pressed while this is 01
Current Sound Test ID in options

Set to 01 when gem has just been collected,
Initiates Level Completed screen, then 
plays transition cutscene
